description: All significant correlation peaks per UTC second per station — one row per propagation path. Records multi-path arrivals (e.g. 2F2, 3F2, 4F2 at different delays) that are discarded by the metrology pipeline but carry ionospheric science value. The dominant arrival (peak_rank=0) corresponds to the measurement used by metrology; secondary arrivals (peak_rank>0) are additional propagation paths.
standards: ITU-R TF.460-6 Standard-frequency and time-signal emissions
reference: Multi-peak search in matched-filter correlation envelope; per-tick edge detector with carrier phase for Doppler-Delay analysis

fields.name: minute_boundary_utc
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary (UTC second 0)

fields.name: utc_second
fields.description: UTC second of the transmitted tone (Unix epoch)

fields.name: peak_rank
fields.description: Arrival rank by correlation SNR: 0=dominant (used by metrology), 1=second strongest, etc.

fields.name: arrival_ms
fields.description: Measured arrival time from buffer start (ms). Convert to UTC: minute_boundary_utc + arrival_ms/1000.

fields.name: timing_error_ms
fields.description: Timing error: arrival_ms - model_expected_ms (ms). Positive = later than model prediction.

fields.name: corr_snr_db
fields.description: Correlation SNR of this peak relative to noise floor (dB). Minimum recorded: 6 dB.

fields.name: peak_value
fields.description: Raw correlation envelope value at this peak (unitless, normalized template energy)

fields.name: model_expected_ms
fields.description: Model-predicted arrival time from buffer start (ms), from HFPropagationModel

fields.name: carrier_phase_rad
fields.description: Carrier phase at tone frequency (radians). Extracted by IQ mix-down at tick onset. Phase slope across ticks encodes Doppler shift; phase scatter indicates multipath.

fields.name: detection_method
fields.description: How this arrival was detected: 'tone_correlator' (long template matched filter, 300-800ms), 'edge_tick' (per-second 5ms tick edge detector), or 'clean' (CLEAN deconvolution).

fields.name: sec_in_minute
fields.description: Second within the minute (0-59) for per-tick detections.

fields.name: processed_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when record was written

quality_flags.GOOD: Peak SNR >= 12 dB, timing error within model uncertainty
quality_flags.MARGINAL: Peak SNR 6-12 dB, or timing error exceeds model uncertainty
quality_flags.BAD: Peak SNR < 6 dB, or timing error implausible for any known mode
